feat.name: Battle-Tested Companion
feat.text: Your companion is a tried and tested ally of unshakable reliability. The companion you gained with Commander's Companion is now a mature animal companion. While your banner is affixed to this companion, the banner's aura is 10 feet greater than it normally is (typically this means the banner's 30-foot aura becomes a 40-foot aura).

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.
